LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THE MARK COMPANY, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
